when.test: searchParams.fromDate != null and searchParams.fromDate != '' and searchParams.toDate != null and searchParams.toDate != ''

choose.when: AND (sdate BETWEEN #{searchParams.fromDate} AND #{searchParams.toDate} OR sdate BETWEEN REPLACE(#{searchParams.fromDate}, '-', '') AND REPLACE(#{searchParams.toDate}, '-', ''))

if.test: searchParams.issue != null and searchParams.issue != '' and searchParams.issue != 'all'

when.test: factory != null and factory != '' and factory != 'all'
storage != null and storage != '' and storage != 'all'

if.test: inboundCondition != null and inboundCondition != '' and inboundCondition != 'all'
fromDate != null and fromDate != '' and toDate != null and toDate != ''

sql.if: AND UPPER( NVL( a.custcode, ( SELECT custcode FROM ( SELECT custcode FROM t_mi_price_buycust WHERE itemcode = a.itemcode ORDER BY condate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) ) ) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{cucode}) || '%'

choose.when: AND UPPER( NVL( a.custcode, ( SELECT custcode FROM ( SELECT custcode FROM t_mi_price_buycust WHERE itemcode = a.itemcode ORDER BY condate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) ) ) != '0039'
AND UPPER( NVL( a.custcode, ( SELECT custcode FROM ( SELECT custcode FROM t_mi_price_buycust WHERE itemcode = a.itemcode ORDER BY condate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) ) ) = '0039'

sql.if: AND UPPER( NVL( a.custname, ( SELECT cu_sangho FROM c_cust WHERE cu_code = ( SELECT custcode FROM ( SELECT custcode FROM t_mi_price_buycust WHERE itemcode = a.itemcode ORDER BY condate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) ) ) ) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{cname}) || '%'

if.test: confirm_yn != null and confirm_yn != '' and confirm_yn != 'all'

when.test: factory != null and factory != '' and factory != 'all'
moveFactory != null and moveFactory != '' and moveFactory != 'all'
moveStorage != null and moveStorage != '' and moveStorage != 'all'

if.test: fromDate != null and fromDate != '' and toDate != null and toDate != ''
status != null and status != '' and status != 'all'

sql.if: AND ( CASE WHEN s.sending_qty IS NULL THEN 'CHECKING' WHEN NVL(a.qty, 0) = NVL(s.sending_qty, 0) THEN 'COMPLETE' ELSE 'CHECKING' END ) = #{searchParams.status}

when.test: scantype != null and scantype != '' and scantype != 'all'
factory != null and factory != '' and factory != 'all'
storage != null and storage != '' and storage != 'all'

scantype != null and scantype != '' and scantype != 'all'

storage != null and storage != '' and storage != 'ALL'
factory != null and factory != '' and factory != 'all'

sql.if: AND (UPPER(a.itemcode) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{itemcode}) || '%' OR UPPER(r.itemcode) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{itemcode}) || '%')

AND (UPPER(REPLACE(a_item.itemname, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(REPLACE(#{itemname}, ' ', '')) || '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(r_item.itemname, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(REPLACE(#{itemname}, ' ', '')) || '%')

when.test: searchParams != null and searchParams.factory != null and searchParams.factory != '' and searchParams.factory != 'all' and searchParams.factory != 'ALL'
searchParams == null or searchParams.factory == null or searchParams.factory == ''

searchParams != null and searchParams.storage != null and ( searchParams.storage == 'MATERIAL+SIDESEAT+OUTSIDE' or searchParams.storage == 'Material+Sideseat+Outside' or searchParams.storage == 'material+sideseat+outside' )
searchParams != null and searchParams.storage != null and searchParams.storage != '' and searchParams.storage != 'all' and searchParams.storage != 'ALL'
searchParams == null or searchParams.storage == null or searchParams.storage == ''

if.test: searchParams != null and searchParams.barcode != null and searchParams.barcode != ''
searchParams != null and searchParams.location != null and searchParams.location != ''
searchParams != null and searchParams.car != null and searchParams.car != ''
searchParams != null and searchParams.itemcode != null and searchParams.itemcode != ''
searchParams != null and searchParams.itemname != null and searchParams.itemname != ''

mapper.sql:
X.FACTORY X.STORAGE X.INDATE X.CAR X.ITEMCODE X.SPEC X.ITEMNAME X.LOCATION TO_NUMBER(TRIM(X.QTY)) X.LOGINID X.HHMM X.BARCODE
X.YMDHMS
ASC DESC
, X.ITEMCODE ASC

if.test: searchParams.factory != null and searchParams.factory != '' and searchParams.factory != 'all'
searchParams.storage != null and searchParams.storage != '' and searchParams.storage != 'all'
searchParams.storage != null and searchParams.storage != '' and searchParams.storage != 'all'

mapper.sql:
X.FACTORY X.STORAGE X.SDATE X.CAR X.ITEMCODE X.SPEC X.ITEMNAME X.LOCATION X.QTY X.LOGINID X.HHMM X.BARCODE X.YMDHMS X.MADATE X.YMDHMS
ASC DESC
, X.ITEMCODE ASC

ORDER BY
FACTORY CAR ITEMCODE ITEMNAME SPEC QTY NOQTY1 NOQTY2 NOQTY3 UNPACKQTY QTY
ASC DESC
, ITEMCODE ASC

when.test: searchParams.factory != null and searchParams.factory != '' and searchParams.factory != 'all'

sql.if: AND UPPER(NVL(A.CUSTNAME, ( SELECT CU_SANGHO FROM C_CUST WHERE CU_CODE = ( SELECT CUSTCODE FROM ( SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_MI_PRICE_BUYCUST WHERE ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER BY CONDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) ))) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchParams.custname}) || '%'

choose.when: AND a.source2 IS NOT NULL AND a.source2 <> 'STOCKCOUNT'

if.test: searchParams.fromDate != null and searchParams.fromDate != '' and searchParams.toDate != null and searchParams.toDate != ''
searchParams.fromDate != null and searchParams.fromDate != '' and searchParams.toDate != null and searchParams.toDate != ''
